creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Fix committed, thank you! Please next time use sort(1) or similar utility 
to sort pkg-plist (files in aphabetical order and @dirrm's in reverse 
alphabetical). Please also considering to add USE_LIBTOOL in Makefile 
to get rid of those useless .la files.
